backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor for the Rajat's Equation backend, combining blob storage, authorization, user approval, session management, and materials management with admin-gated mutations and per-student queries.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (login gate removal, admin student display, session management, etc.) to their relevant source files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key changes of every page and component in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vite/React SPA, setting the page title, favicon, and viewport meta for 'The Rajat's Equation' app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in a React Query provider, TanStack Router provider, a Sonner toaster, and a top-level error boundary.
frontend/src/components/BackendUnavailab: Full-screen component that shows a loading spinner while the initial canister health check is pending, or an error state with a 'Check Again' button once the backend is confirmed offline.
frontend/src/components/LoadingSpinner.t: Simple reusable animated spinner component with configurable size (sm/md/lg) and optional className.
frontend/src/components/NotificationBell: Popover notification bell component that reads notifications from localStorage, filters by studentId, shows an unread badge count, and supports mark-as-read per notification or all at once.
frontend/src/components/OfflineBanner.ts: Renders a full-width amber banner with a WiFi-off icon when the user is offline; returns null when online.
frontend/src/components/ReceiptModal.tsx: Displays a payment receipt in a dialog modal, showing payment details, status banner, and optional access code for a given Payment object.
frontend/src/components/StatCard.tsx: A styled card component that displays a stat title, value, optional subtitle, and a Lucide icon with configurable color themes.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Renders a color-coded pill badge for a fixed set of status values (pending, approved, rejected, etc.).
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: An anchor link button that opens a WhatsApp chat with a pre-encoded message to a hardcoded phone number.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttendance.ts: Re-exports attendance query hooks and provides a convenience wrapper that converts a principal string to a Principal object for fetching student attendance.
frontend/src/hooks/useCanisterHealth.ts: Polls the ICP canister every 30 seconds via getProducts to track online/offline state, exposing isPending, wasOffline, and a manual checkHealth function.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout, identity persistence, and status tracking via AuthClient, exposed through a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useMaterials.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, adding, and deleting student materials via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central collection of React Query hooks covering user profiles, approvals, payments, sessions, attendance, and products against the ICP backend actor.
Shows a success toast and invalidates all React Query caches when the canister transitions from offline back to online.
frontend/src/hooks/useSessions.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching sessions for a student, adding a new session, and deleting a session via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter font, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS design tokens (colors, sidebar, chart variables) for light and dark themes.
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin shell layout with a collapsible sidebar, navigation links for all admin routes, logout handling, and a backend health check that shows a BackendUnavailableScreen when offline.
frontend/src/layouts/RootLayout.tsx: Top-level layout component that initializes the localStorage store on mount and renders child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/layouts/StudentLayout.tsx: Student shell layout with a collapsible sidebar, navigation links for student routes, logout handling, and an offline banner shown when the canister health check returns offline.
frontend/src/lib/auth.ts: Utility module for persisting and retrieving auth state (role, studentId, etc.) and offline-cached student credentials in localStorage.
frontend/src/lib/store.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and localStorage-backed helpers for the app's data store (courses, students, payments, sessions, materials, notifications) with default seed data.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for merging Tailwind class names and formatting currency, dates, and datetimes for the Indian locale.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AttendanceManag: Admin page for marking and viewing student attendance, listing approved students and their sessions; backend attendance calls are currently disabled due to missing student Principal data.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Courses.tsx: Admin page for managing courses, providing UI to add, edit, delete, and toggle active status of courses using a modal form and card grid layout.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page that displays summary statistics (students, sessions, materials, payments) and lists of recent students and sessions.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageStudentMa: Admin page for assigning and deleting study materials for individual students, with a student selector driven by approvals and payments data.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageStudentSe: Admin page for scheduling and deleting tutoring sessions for individual students, pulling student options from approvals and payment records.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Materials.tsx: Legacy admin materials page that stores and manages student study materials locally in localStorage, with a form to add materials linked to approved students fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Notifications.t: Admin page for creating and deleting notifications, supporting broadcast to all approved students or targeting a specific student, with form state managed locally via a localStorage-backed store.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Payments.tsx: Admin page for viewing, filtering, approving, and rejecting UPI payment requests fetched from the backend canister, with dialogs for entering unique codes or rejection notes.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Sessions.tsx: Admin page for managing tutoring sessions stored in a local store, allowing admins to add new sessions with scheduling details and delete existing ones.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Students.tsx: Admin page that lists student approval records from the backend canister and allows approving, rejecting, or revoking student access, with payment status cross-referenced from payment data.
frontend/src/pages/Landing.tsx: Public-facing landing page for 'Rajat's Equation' tutoring service, displaying courses, features, testimonials, and contact info with a sticky navbar and WhatsApp integration.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page supporting student and admin modes via Internet Identity, storing auth state in localStorage and redirecting to the appropriate dashboard after authentication.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Simple static page shown after a failed payment, offering links to retry payment or return to the student dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Page shown after a successful payment submission that adds a pending-approval notification for the student and displays next-steps instructions.
frontend/src/pages/Register.tsx: Multi-step registration flow where users select a course, session type, and hours, then complete payment via UPI QR code or deep link before submitting a transaction ID.
frontend/src/pages/student/Book.tsx: Student booking page that lets students select a course and session type, displays a UPI QR code and deep link for payment, and submits a pending payment record with a transaction ID to the local store.
frontend/src/pages/student/Courses.tsx: Displays the student's enrolled courses by matching their course name from the store, showing course details, material count, and a WhatsApp contact button if no courses are found.
frontend/src/pages/student/Dashboard.tsx: Student dashboard showing a greeting banner, stats (total classes and materials), upcoming sessions, and recent materials pulled from the store for the authenticated student.
frontend/src/pages/student/Materials.tsx: Displays study materials assigned to the authenticated student, grouped by course, with links to view each file and an offline indicator.
frontend/src/pages/student/MyMaterials.t: Lists all study materials assigned to the authenticated student in a flat list sorted by upload date, with file view links and an offline indicator.
frontend/src/pages/student/MySessions.ts: Shows all scheduled classes for the authenticated student sorted by date, displaying session title, date, time, duration, and an optional meeting join link.
frontend/src/pages/student/Payments.tsx: Displays the student's payment history with summary stats (total spent, approved, pending counts) and a list of individual payments with status badges and receipt modal support.
frontend/src/pages/student/Profile.tsx: Student profile page that displays personal info (name, email, phone, course, access codes, hours) pulled from the local store or auth state, with an offline indicator when the canister is unreachable.
frontend/src/pages/student/Sessions.tsx: Student sessions page that lists upcoming and past sessions for the logged-in student, with cards showing date, time, duration, and an optional Google Meet join link.
frontend/src/routeTree.ts: Defines the full TanStack Router route tree for the app, including public routes, role-guarded admin and student routes, and payment result pages, with auth checks via localStorage.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that enables dark mode, registers typography/container-queries/animate plugins, and extends the theme with OKLCH CSS-variable-based semantic colors, brand navy/gold colors, and accordion keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks project state version, summary, architectural notes, known issues, and existing features for a student learning portal with admin dashboard. Defines requirements around removing payment gates from sign-in and fixing admin dropdown population for sessions and materials.
